ale001.summary: 9:18PM - ALEX rage texts VIC that MARCUS stole his IP. Cease and Desist all work on NeurAI or we’re going to court.

ale002.summary: 10:10PM - ALEX tells REMI that MARCUS's code for BizAI was fundamentally flawed, but MARCUS lied and said it worked perfectly.

ale003.summary: 11:32PM - ALEX's pent-up rage about stolen equity explodes into physical violence against MARCUS.

ale004.summary: 1:08AM - ALEX shows VIC the specs. MARCUS’s code is worthless. Their $30 million investment in NeurAI bought them a sham.

ash001.summary: 8:52PM - ASHE witnesses MARCUS treat KAI like dirt. “I hired you to decorate, not think.”

ash002.summary: 9:59PM - ASHE confronts TAYLOR about leaking their expose on MARCUS BLACKWOOD, allowing him to bury it and get ASHE fired.

ash003.summary: 11:10PM - ZIA takes pity on ASHE and decides to share their story about how when MARCUS’s own code wasn’t ready for a demo, he turned to ZIA for help.

ash004.summary: 12:36AM - EZRA sits down with ASHE to unload about the chaos of the night, on the record, in a rare sit-down interview.

cas001.summary: 8:57PM - CASS tells QUINN how MARCUS requested the Synesthesia Engine for his parties. Their demo went perfectly and he’s promised $50,000 once the contract goes through.

cas002.summary: 10:27PM - EZRA helps CASS prepare to pitch their Synesthesia Engine. Now they just need to catch SKYLER or VIC for a private moment.

cas003.summary: 11:19PM - SKYLER listens to CASS pitch their Synesthesia Engine idea. It doesn’t go well.

cas004.summary: 12:38AM - KAI discovers that MARCUS stole CASS’s Synethesia Engine code and is planning to run the program at tonight’s party on all of his guests.

ezr001.summary: 9:18PM - ZIA asks EZRA for advice because they are worried that MARCUS is using their code without permission, recompense or credit.

ezr002.summary: 10:27PM - CASS had to sign an NDA about their work on the Synesthesia Engine for MARCUS, which seems suspiciously hush hush to EZRA.

ezr003.summary: 12:02AM - QUINN asks EZRA for advice about MARCUS. He won’t listen to QUINN’s important safety concerns.

ezr004.summary: 12:42AM- EZRA grants a rare interview to ASHE, and concedes that MARCUS has been lost to the machine that is capitalism.

fli001.summary: 8:07PM - FLIP asks MARCUS for a loan to pay his bookie, in exchange for a an undefined favor to be cashed in at an undetermined time. Again.

fli002.summary: 9:42PM - FLIP, AKA construction worker Phil Kowalski, gets rebuffed by JESS, then seeks out SAM for drugs to help mask their anxiety.

fli003.summary: 11:29PM - FLIP witnesses MARCUS hand an envelope full of cash to MORGAN near the bar.

fli004.summary: 1:45AM - FLIP takes more party drugs from SAM to escape his concerns about MARCUS before flirting with RILEY.

jam001.summary: 8:07PM - JAMIE witnesses MARCUS hand an envelope full of cash to a construction worker he knows.

jam002.summary: 10:01PM - JAMIE overhears MARCUS with a stranger. Something about ingesting extracts that are untested and dangerous. Then they watch MARCUS ingest them anyway.

jam003.summary: 11:39PM - There was a fist fight. MARCUS got punched. JAMIE overhears a VC say “He’s out. You’re in. Trust me. It’s done.” SARAH’s name was also mentioned.

jam004.summary: 12:32AM - JAMIE overhears SKYLER insist that MARCUS has run out of time. If he can’t get his AI to work, he should try programming the prototype with memory recordings instead.

jes001.summary: 8:17PM - JESS get’s rejected by her lover, MARCUS.

jes002.summary: 9:42PM - JESS overhears SAM complaining to NAT. They’re worried that MARCUS is experimenting on himself with a experimental drug called Psychotrophin-3A. JESS can confirm that it’s true

jes003.summary: 11:04PM - JESS tells NAT about their experience having their memory extracted by MARCUS after taking Psychotrophin-3A.

jes004.summary: 1:36AM- JESS and SARAH have a moment of truth about the pregnancy, finding unexpected understanding. They’re not enemies - they’re both his victims.

kaa001.summary: 09/15/26 - KAI is ‘hired’ by MARCUS to do a ‘test install’. Payment is in the form of promise of future work.

kai001.summary: 8:43PM- KAI is hustling to complete their installation, trying to appease another last minute request from MARCUS

kai002.summary: 9:32PM - KAI searches desperately for ASHE after MARCUS dismisses him as “just a vendor” instead of respecting his artistry.

kai003.summary: 11:19PM - KAI overhears CASS pitching their Synesthesia Engine project to SKYLER. The concept sounds eerily familiar…

kai004.summary: 12:38AM - KAI and CASS discover that MARCUS has stolen The Synesthesia Engine and plans to run it from KAI’s art installation at the party tonight.

mab001.summary: ??/??/?? - MARCUS’ Memory extraction experiment notes indicate that MEMORIES are RETURNED to their OWNER if tokens are not processed before EXPIRATION.

mab002.summary: 07/15/2026 - MARCUS is contacted by a mysterious stranger soon after DEREK's brings a new party ‘favor’ to the scene. An opportunity to exploit his connections for profit.

mar004.summary: 12:55AM - MARCUS drugs, manipulates and then executes a memory capture protocol on his own guests. Afterwards, the token locking system he insists on is… chaotic.

mel001.summary: 8:28PM - MEL reminisces with NAT about negotiating with Stanford police in 2007 to avoid arrests, after SAM and MARCUS’s first party got raided. That was the day they became "The Party Lawyer.”

mel002.summary: 10:10PM - MARCUS secretly cleaned out his shared bank account with SARAH after she told him she wanted a divorce.

mel003.summary: 11:09PM - RILEY has evidence of secret bank accounts and insider trading. MEL has the paternity test and evidence of infidelity. MARCUS has no idea what’s coming.

mel004.summary: 12:50AM - MEL learns from SAM and NAT that MARCUS is complicit in many crimes. They consider using this intel as blackmail to help SARAH out.

mor001.summary: 8:23PM - MORGAN and VIC meet to discuss “The MARCUS problem” and what to do about his erratic and likely drug-fueled behavior.

mor002.summary: 10:12PM - RILEY has evidence that MORGAN helped MARCUS set up shell companies, insider trading schemes and environmental degradation. MORGAN helps RILEY in exchange for keeping their name out of it.

mor003.summary: 11:22PM - MORGAN threatens MARCUS with damning evidence unless MARCUS takes responsibility for their insider trading collaboration. MARCUS bribes MORGAN to make it all go away.

mor004.summary: 12:40AM - MORGAN spills the tea they have on MARCUS, including the time he insisted on a sit down with a world leader. “Get me a real meeting. Someone with actual power.”

nat002.summary: 9:42PM - SAM is panicking about MARCUS over-using an experimental memory drug that SAM makes for him. “If he goes down, I do too.”

nat003.summary: 11:04PM - MARCUS is developing a technology to extract human memories from willing subjects.

qui002.summary: 9:59PM - QUINN has continued dangerous research into experimental drug Psychotrophin3A because MARCUS is interested in its neural plasticity effects enough to blackmail them into providing it.

qui003.summary: 12:02AM - QUINN gets advice from EZRA on the deep guilt and anxiety they feel about providing MARCUS with Psychotrophin-3A’s dangerous potential.

rem001.summary: 9:02PM - REMI watches MARCUS entering a secret room adjoining the party space.

rem002.summary: 9:37PM - REMI follows MARCUS into his secret lab and comes back out again with a flash drive of MARCUS’s files to share with ALEX.

rem003.summary: 11:29PM - REMI leverages evidence of MARCUS’s code theft to strengthen their connection with VIC

ril001.summary: 8:46PM - RILEY writes SARAH a letter listing all the reasons she should leave MARCUS. Left off the list… MARCUS got someone else pregnant.

ril002.summary: 10:12PM - RILEY confronts MORGAN about the insider trading scheme and shell companies they set up for MARCUS. They make a deal to hide MORGAN’s name so that RILEY can trace the money for SARAH.

ril003.summary: 11:43PM - RILEY tells SARAH about evidence confirming MORGAN helped MARCUS set up shell companies that shielded his hidden investments and insider trading schemes.

ril004.summary: 12:45AM - FLIP brags about discovering illegal venues for MARCUS’s parties using their B&E skills. RILEY wonders when the kissing is going to start.

sab002.summary: 09/20/2020 - SARAH submits resignation from Facebook to support MARCUS's BizAI launch.

sam001.summary: 8:25PM - SAM overhears VIC and MORGAN talking about going to jail because of MARCUS. SAM threatens to leave with his special memory drugs unless MARCUS explains himself.

sam002.summary: 10:44PM - SAM gets MARCUS high on his “usual party blend,” then learns that MARCUS stole and took credit for ALEX’s code at BizAI.

sam003.summary: 11:17PM - REMI asks SAM for a laptop. They hand theirs over without pausing to consider how many secrets are on it. Then REMI asks a hacker. They can provide that too, and text ZIA.

sam004.summary: 12:50AM - MEL waves MARCUS’s paternity test around like it’s news, but SAM was the one who mailed it to SARAH in the first place. Wait until they learn what you and NAT figured out...

sar003.summary: 11:35PM - ALEX apologizes to SARAH after a fistfight with MARCUS. “Why the hell are you still with him? He’s such an asshole!” “I know he is… but he’s my asshole.”

sar004.summary: 12:36AM- SARAH learns JESS is her husband’s pregnant mistress. She offers unexpected solidarity. “That baby deserves better. We both do.”

sky001.summary: 9:19PM - SKYLER tells TAYLOR about schema that could HYPOTHETICALLY be used to build the world’s first humanoid biological robot with functional intelligence, but needs MARCUS’s AI for agent training.

sky002.summary: 10:22PM - MARCUS probes SKYLER about CyberLife’s neural adaptation protocols. His questions are too specific. SKYLER wonders if he’s secretly accessed their proprietary files.

sky003.summary: 11:19PM - SKYLER’s attention drifts while CASS pitches their Synesthesia Engine idea. They notice MORGAN and MARCUS in a tense standoff across the room.

sky004.summary: 12:32AM - SKYLER instructs MARCUS to boot up an experimental robotic prototype with captured human memories.

tay001.summary: 9:19PM - In an exclusive interview, SKYLER presents plans for a benevolent, lifelike, agentic cyber-escort. They have a robotic prototype ready, but need MARCUS’s tech for the agent training.

tay002.summary: 9:51pm - TAYLOR drunkenly brags to ZIA about getting ASHE fired from the Silicon Valley Business Journal to win an exclusive with MARCUS

tay003.summary: 12:22AM - TAYLOR emails MORGAN with an offer to get a story of his choosing in front of readers eyes. “We both know attention = power.”

tay004.summary: 12:40AM - MORGAN gives an exclusive interview to TAYLOR about MARCUS’s illegal dealings: shell companies, insider trading, dangerous experiments, lying under oath... It’s reputation destroying stuff.

vic001.summary: 8:23PM - VIC and MORGAN meet to discuss a solution to the MARCUS’s criminal liability problem.

vic002.summary: 9:55PM - VIC makes plans to replace MARCUS with ALEX at the head of NeurAI to avoid criminal conspiracy charges.

vic003.summary: 11:35PM - VIC tells MARCUS he’s fired from NeurAI while he’s slumped on the sidewalk, bleeding all over their designer scarf.

zia001.summary: 9:18PM - MARCUS showed up at ZIA’s, unannounced, begging to “borrow” their algorithm for a demo with CyberLife. They agreed. Now MARCUS has ghosted them, and they’re looking for advice from EZRA.

zia002.summary: 9:59PM - ZIA watches as ASHE annihilates TAYLOR. ASHE accuses the journalist of conspiring with MARCUS to get them fired, all so that TAYLOR could score an exclusive.

zia003.summary: 11:10PM - ZIA tells ASHE that MARCUS asked to “borrow” ZIA’s storage algorithm without any intention of returning the code. He’s using it, and pretending it’s his own work.
